mail-domains.title: Mail Domains
mail-domains.description: List of domains that this relay server will consider internal

mail-server-host.description: The mail server host (IPv6) for this domain
mail-server-host.title: Mail Server Host

mail-server-port.description: The mail server port for this domain
mail-server-port.title: Mail Server Port

can-send.description: Whether this domain can send (outbound) emails through the relay

authentication.description: Authentication method: 'none' for IP-based, 'password' for SASL

fingerprints.title: Backend TLS certificate(s) fingerprint(s)
fingerprints.description:: List of fingerprints of the backend's certificates to authentify the backend to the relay

enable.title: Enable oMailGw CLI
enable.description: Run the built-in oMailGw relay-side client for this relay.

api-url.title: oMailGw API URL
api-url.description: Base URL of the oMailGw API, including the /api suffix.

api-user.title: oMailGw API User
api-user.description: API user used by the relay-side oMailGw client.

api-password.title: oMailGw API Password
api-password.description: API password used by the relay-side oMailGw client.

server-hostname.title: oMailGw Server Hostname
server-hostname.description: Hostname registered in oMailGw for this relay.

relay-poll-interval.title: oMailGw Relay Poll Interval
relay-poll-interval.description: Seconds between background oMailGw relay polling runs.
